retry_reason: Failure is due to command send error; retrying may succeed if transient, but function is not a refcount wrapper, so retry is not a refcount concern.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to construct and send a WMI ADDBA command, not reference-count management. The sk_buff allocation/free is incidental internal infrastructure.
